lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਆਏ ਤਾ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਪਠਾਏ ਚਾਲੇ ਤਿਨੈ ਬੁਲਾਇ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa aae taa tineh patthaae chaale tinai bulaae leaa |
lines.english: He comes when the Lord sends him; when the Lord calls him back, he goes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੋ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੈ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karanaa so kar rahiaa bakhasanahaarai bakhas leaa |10|
lines.english: Whatever he does, the Lord is doing. The Forgiving Lord forgives him. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਏਹੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਣੁ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਖੋਜੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin ehu chaakhiaa raam rasaaein tin kee sangat khoj bheaa |
lines.english: I seek to be with those who have tasted this sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: ridh sidh budh giaan guroo te paaeaa mukat padaarath saran peaa |11|
lines.english: Wealth, miraculous spiritual powers, wisdom and spiritual knowledge, are obtained from the Guru. The treasure of liberation is obtained in His Sanctuary. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਣਾ ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਤੇ ਬਿਰਕਤੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh guramukh sam kar jaanaa harakh sog te birakat bheaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh looks upon pain and pleasure as one and the same; he remains untouched by joy and sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇ ਲਇਆ ॥੧੨॥੭॥
lines.translit: aap maar guramukh har paae naanak sehaj samaae leaa |12|7|
lines.english: Conquering his self-conceit, the Gurmukh finds the Lord; O Nanak, he intuitively merges into the Lord. ||12||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਸਿ ਲੀਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jat sat sanjam saach drirraaeaa saach sabad ras leenaa |1|
lines.english: Abstinence, chastity, self-control and truthfulness have been implanted within me; I am imbued with the sublime essence of the True Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਦਖਣੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee dakhanee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Dakhanee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਲੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: meraa gur deaal sadaa rang leenaa |
lines.english: My Merciful Guru remains forever imbued with the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹੈ ਗਗਨ ਪੁਰਿ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਮੈਸਰਿ ਅਨਹਤ ਸਬਦਿ ਰੰਗੀਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rahai gagan pur drisatt samaisar anahat sabad rangeenaa |2|
lines.english: He abides in the Tenth Gate, and looks equally upon all; He is imbued with the unstruck sound current of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਰਹੈ ਏਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਸਾਚੇ ਦੇਖਿ ਪਤੀਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis rahai ek liv laagee saache dekh pateenaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Day and night, He remains lovingly focused on the One Lord; gazing upon the True Lord, He is pleased. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਚੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚੁ ਰਾਚੇ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਪਤੀਣਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: milai gur saache jin rach raache kirat veechaar pateenaa |4|
lines.english: The One who created the creation has met the True Guru; contemplating the Guru's lifestyle, He is pleased. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਬੰਧਿ ਕੁਪੀਨ ਭਰਿਪੁਰਿ ਲੀਣਾ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਸੀਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sat bandh kupeen bharipur leenaa jihavaa rang raseenaa |3|
lines.english: Wearing the loin-cloth of chastity, He remains absorbed in the all-pervading Lord; His tongue enjoys the taste of God's Love. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਮਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਰਬ ਮਹਿ ਏਕਾ ਏਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਿਖਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: ek meh sarab sarab meh ekaa eeh satigur dekh dikhaaee |5|
lines.english: All are in the One, and the One is in all. This is what the True Guru has shown me. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਪਕ ਤੇ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਜੋਤਿ ਦਿਖਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: deepak te deepak paragaasiaa tribhavan jot dikhaaee |7|
lines.english: From the lamp of God, the lamp within is lit; the Divine Light illuminates the three worlds. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਏ ਖੰਡ ਮੰਡਲ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡਾ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਖਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jin kee khandd manddal brahamanddaa so prabh lakhan na jaaee |6|
lines.english: He who created the worlds, solar systems and galaxies - that God cannot be known. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਤਖਤਿ ਸਚ ਮਹਲੀ ਬੈਠੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sachai takhat sach mahalee baitthe nirbhau taarree laaee |8|
lines.english: The Guru sits on the true throne in the true mansion; He is attuned, absorbed in the Fearless Lord. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਗਇਆ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਜੋਗੀ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਕਿੰਗੁਰੀ ਵਾਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: mohi geaa bairaagee jogee ghatt ghatt kinguree vaaee |9|
lines.english: The Guru, the detached Yogi, has enticed the hearts of all; He plays His harp in each and every heart. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਕੀ ਛੂਟੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਚੁ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੧੦॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak saran prabhoo kee chhootte satigur sach sakhaaee |10|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, in God's Sanctuary, one is emancipated; the True Guru becomes our true help and support. ||10||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੇਤੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਉਧਾਰੀ ਸੰਤਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh ketee sabad udhaaree santahu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, the Gurmukhs have saved so very many, O Saints. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਹਠਿ ਹਸਤ ਮੜੀ ਘਰੁ ਛਾਇਆ ਧਰਣਿ ਗਗਨ ਕਲ ਧਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aauhatth hasat marree ghar chhaaeaa dharan gagan kal dhaaree |1|
lines.english: He has made His home in the monastery of the heart; He has infused His power into the earth and the sky. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Raamkalee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਨੈ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manasaa maar manai meh raakhai satigur sabad veechaaree |3|
lines.english: He conquers desire, and enshrines the Lord within his mind; he contemplates the Word of the True Guru's Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਤਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਸੋਖੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mamataa maar haumai sokhai tribhavan jot tumaaree |2|
lines.english: He conquers attachment, and eradicates egotism, and sees Your Divine Light pervading the three worlds, Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿੰਙੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਅਨਾਹਦਿ ਵਾਜੈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: singee surat anaahad vaajai ghatt ghatt jot tumaaree |4|
lines.english: The horn of consciousness vibrates the unstruck sound current; Your Light illuminates each and every heart, Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: panch tat mil ahinis deepak niramal jot apaaree |6|
lines.english: Bringing together the five elements, day and night, the Lord's lamp shines with the Immaculate Light of the Infinite. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਪੰਚ ਬੇਣੁ ਤਹੀ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਅਗਨਿ ਪਰਜਾਰੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: parapanch ben tahee man raakhiaa braham agan parajaaree |5|
lines.english: He plays the flute of the universe in his mind, and lights the fire of God. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਨਗਰੀ ਮਹਿ ਆਸਣੁ ਅਉਧੂ ਅਲਖੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੀ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: siv nagaree meh aasan aaudhoo alakh agam apaaree |8|
lines.english: The true hermit obtains a seat in the City of God, the invisible, inaccessible, infinite. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਸਸਿ ਲਉਕੇ ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਕਿੰਗੁਰੀ ਵਾਜੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਨਿਰਾਰੀ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: rav sas lauke ihu tan kinguree vaajai sabad niraaree |7|
lines.english: The right and left nostrils, the sun and the moon channels, are the strings of the body-harp; they vibrate the wondrous melody of the Shabad. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਨਗਰੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਜਾ ਪੰਚ ਵਸਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa nagaree ihu man raajaa panch vaseh veechaaree |9|
lines.english: The mind is the king of the city of the body; the five sources of knowledge dwell within it. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਵੈ ਆਸਣਿ ਘਰਿ ਰਾਜਾ ਅਦਲੁ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਣਕਾਰੀ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sabad ravai aasan ghar raajaa adal kare gunakaaree |10|
lines.english: Seated in his home, this king chants the Shabad; he administers justice and virtue. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਬਿਕਾਲੁ ਕਹੇ ਕਹਿ ਬਪੁਰੇ ਜੀਵਤ ਮੂਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੀ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: kaal bikaal kahe keh bapure jeevat mooaa man maaree |11|
lines.english: What can poor death or birth say to him? Conquering his mind, he remains dead while yet alive. ||11||
